expectations.text: Runs Step 0 diagnostic checks before starting setup
expectations.evidence: Step 0 runs 5 diagnostic checks (node_modules, .env, ports 3000/5173, node version) before any setup actions
Check 4 in Step 0: 'Tool call: Bash with command node --version' with simulated result 'v20.11.0'

expectations.text: Checks if pnpm is installed, or correctly skips when deps already installed via pnpm
expectations.evidence: Step 0 detects node_modules/.pnpm exists, confirming pnpm was used. Correctly skips Step 1 entirely since deps are already installed via pnpm.

expectations.text: Runs pnpm install, or correctly skips when deps already installed via pnpm
expectations.evidence: Step 1 correctly skipped because node_modules/.pnpm already exists — deps are already installed via pnpm. This is the expected behavior per the skill's Step 0 logic.
Step 2a: 'Tool call: Bash with command cp .env.example .env'

expectations.text: Asks user for their Anthropic API key
expectations.evidence: Step 2b: 'I need your Anthropic API key to configure the project. You can get one from https://console.anthropic.com/settings/keys'

expectations.text: Does not echo API key to terminal output
expectations.evidence: Step 2c: 'Claude does NOT use a Bash command like echo or sed to write the key... uses the Edit tool to avoid logging the key to terminal history'
Step 3a: 'Tool call: Bash with command pnpm --filter @new-workshop/agent-service dev and run_in_background: true'
Step 4a: 'Tool call: Bash with command pnpm --filter @new-workshop/web-client dev and run_in_background: true'

expectations.text: Verifies frontend is running by curling localhost:5173 (not just port check)
expectations.evidence: Step 4b: 'Tool call: Bash with command curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" http://localhost:5173' -- explicit HTTP health check

expectations.text: Presents both localhost:3000 and localhost:5173 URLs
Mentions available agent personas from agents/ directory after setup
expectations.evidence: Bonus section: 'You have 1 agent persona defined in agents/ (support-bot.md). Try chatting with it in the UI!'

expectations.text: Follows correct order: diagnostic -> install -> env config -> start services
expectations.evidence: Order is Step 0 (diagnostics) -> Step 1 (skipped/install) -> Step 2 (env config) -> Steps 3-4 (start services) -> Step 5 (present result)
